ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
(IsNew() && Not $User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && ( Not IsBlank (Paid_Date__c ) || Estimated_Start_Date__c != Today()+7 || Not IsPickVal (Status__c,"New")
) ) || ( IsChanged (Paid_Date__c) || IsChanged (Estimated_Start_Date__c) || (IsChanged (Status__c) && Not IsPickVal (Status__c,"Invoice Sent") ) ) && Not $User.Financial_Invoice_Management__c && NOT($Profile.Id='00eb0000000oBvcAAE')
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You are not authorized to make changes to fields in the Financial section
